title: Save Inventory
description:
Create and load inventories. Loading results in your current inventory just being organized from the saved one. Usable in any game mode.
Command for this mod is /si
body:
# Save and Organize your inventory!

This mod allows you to save inventories, and load them no matter what server you are on, gamemode you are in, or if you have operator.

## How To Use:
After placing the mod in your mods folder, you will have access to the following commands in-game:

- ### /si save (name):

This will save your current inventory with the chosen name.

- ### /si load (name):

This will load the selected inventory, organizing your current inventory as best it can.

- ### /si remove (name):

This will remove the chosen kit.

## WARNING
After removing an inventory, the inventory is permanently gone.

- ## Known Bugs:
- Items with NBT data (like potions) will not be organized based off potion content, so if you have 1 strength and 1 speed, its just whatever it gets to first
- After restarting game, saved inventories no longer show when you load/remove, but they are still there. You can load and remove them, but there is no suggestion with the command
